(centos7)All results and logs: https://testing.whamcloud.com/gerrit-janitor/40810/results.html

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

It would be nice if the addition of the V2 format could be moved earlier/off to the side of the patch series, possibly right after https://review.whamcloud.com/38352 or directly on master (though this might cause conflicts).

Since this changing the on-disk format, if this is landed earlier (in 2.16.0) keeping V1 as the default format, then it would add some downgrade compatibility when V2 is enabled by default (probably in 2.17).

parents.subject: LU-10499 pcc: avoid dead lock for auto attach in PCC-RO

commit.subject: LU-10499 pcc: support a flatter HSM archive format
commit.message:
LU-10499 pcc: support a flatter HSM archive format

Add versioning (v1 and V2) to the HSM (PCC) archive format (directory
layout):
	v1: (oid & 0xffff)/-/-/-/-/-/FID
	v2: ((oid ^ seq) & 0xffff)/FID

v1 is the original layout and the default. v2 is the new layout which
should be selected for new installs.

EX-bug-id: EX-2579
Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: If660f3cf4c02469bb23e65a44f86f0346367adf6
